backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor for the wedding invitation platform, defining data types and stores for invitations, events, RSVPs, photos, music, and user profiles, with authorization and blob storage mixins included.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping two background/CSS fix features to their affected frontend files, components, and test IDs with high confidence.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document containing one-sentence summaries of each frontend source file, describing their purpose, key hooks used, and notable implementation details.
frontend/index.css: Root Tailwind CSS file defining light and dark theme CSS custom properties (oklch-based color tokens) for backgrounds, foregrounds, borders, and sidebar, plus base body/border styles.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML entry point that mounts the React app into a root div and loads the main TypeScript module.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that sets up TanStack Router with all page routes, React Query client, and a forced light ThemeProvider with an ivory background override on the root layout.
frontend/src/components/auth/AuthGuard.t: Authentication guard component that checks Internet Identity login state, assigns a user role via the backend actor with retry/backoff logic, and renders login or loading screens before allowing children to render.
frontend/src/components/dashboard/RSVPRe: A modal component that displays RSVP responses and statistics for a given invitation, with loading, error, and retry states.
frontend/src/components/events/EventCard: A styled card component that displays event details (type, title, date, time, venue) with edit and delete actions, using color themes per event type.
frontend/src/components/events/EventForm: A form component for creating or editing an event, with fields for type, title, date, time, venue, and description.
frontend/src/components/guest/CountdownT: A countdown timer component that displays days, hours, minutes, and seconds until the wedding date, styled using the invitation's selected template.
frontend/src/components/guest/CoupleIntr: A section component that displays the bride and groom's names and photos with scroll animation, styled according to the invitation's template.
frontend/src/components/guest/EventTimel: Renders a scrollable timeline of wedding events (haldi, mehndi, etc.) as styled cards with gradient headers, date/time/venue details, and scroll-triggered animations based on the invitation's template colors and fonts.
frontend/src/components/guest/HeroSectio: Displays the full-screen hero section of a guest invitation page, showing the couple's names, optional photos, and a decorative background using template-derived colors and animation classes.
frontend/src/components/guest/PhotoGalle: Renders a responsive photo gallery grid with a fullscreen lightbox viewer that supports previous/next navigation, styled using the invitation's template colors.
frontend/src/components/guest/RSVPForm.t: Provides a styled RSVP form for guests to submit attendance, guest count, and a message, with dark/light theme support and success/error states handled via a mutation hook.
frontend/src/components/guest/VenueSecti: Displays the wedding venue details (name, address, date/time, directions) in a styled card with scroll animation, using template-derived colors and fonts.
frontend/src/components/guest/WhatsAppSh: A fixed floating button that opens a pre-filled WhatsApp share link for the invitation URL and couple's name.
frontend/src/components/layout/Decorativ: Renders a decorative section divider in one of three variants—mandala (with image), flourish (with corner images), or a simple gold dot-and-line style.
frontend/src/components/layout/Header.ts: Sticky navigation header for the Vivah app with a logo, Dashboard link, and Create button, using TanStack Router for navigation and active-route highlighting.
frontend/src/components/media/MusicContr: Floating audio player component that supports autoplay, play/pause toggle, mute, and volume control via an expandable panel fixed to the bottom-right of the screen.
frontend/src/components/media/MusicUploa: Form component for uploading an audio file (MP3/WAV/M4A) as a data URL into the invitation form context, with inline play/pause preview and an autoplay toggle.
frontend/src/components/media/PhotoGalle: Drag-and-drop and click-to-upload photo gallery component that stores images as data URLs in the invitation form context and displays them in a deletable grid.
frontend/src/components/SkeletonLoader.t: Reusable skeleton loading component supporting four variants (card, text, image, invitation-card) that renders shimmer placeholder elements in a grid or list layout.
frontend/src/components/templates/Animat: UI selector for choosing one of three animation modes (Minimal, Elegant, Cinematic) for the invitation, persisted via the InvitationFormContext.
frontend/src/components/templates/Backgr: Controls panel for selecting background type (solid/gradient/texture) and toggling decorative elements like mandala watermark, floral border, gold frame, animated petals, and diya glow.
frontend/src/components/templates/ColorS: Color customization panel offering preset luxury palettes and individual color pickers for primary, accent, and background colors, all synced to the InvitationFormContext.
frontend/src/components/templates/FontSe: A UI component that lets users select font pairings from curated luxury presets or individually choose heading/body fonts via dropdowns, updating the invitation form context accordingly.
frontend/src/components/templates/Templa: Renders a live preview of the wedding invitation using form data (colors, fonts, couple names, date) and toggleable decorative elements like mandala watermark, floral border, animated petals, and diya glow.
Displays a grid of premium wedding themes with color swatches and preview strips, allowing users to select a theme that applies its colors and fonts to the invitation form.
frontend/src/components/wizard/CoupleDet: A wizard step form for entering bride/groom names, wedding date, and optional profile photos with upload/preview/remove functionality, gating the Next button on required fields.
frontend/src/components/wizard/EventMana: A wizard step for managing wedding events (add, edit, delete) using EventCard and EventForm components, displaying events sorted by date with optional navigation controls.
frontend/src/components/wizard/MediaMana: A wizard step that embeds PhotoGalleryUpload and MusicUploader components for adding guest-facing photos and background music to the invitation, with optional Back/Next navigation.
frontend/src/components/wizard/ProgressB: Renders a multi-step progress bar with a connecting line, step circles (completed/active/inactive states), and step title labels below each circle.
frontend/src/components/wizard/ReviewSte: Displays a summary of all invitation form data (couple details, events, template, media) and collects a URL slug input before final submission.
frontend/src/components/wizard/TemplateT: Wizard step that provides tabbed UI for selecting template, color scheme, font, background decorations, and animation mode, with optional Back/Next navigation buttons.
frontend/src/context/InvitationFormConte: Defines and provides a React context for managing all invitation form state, including couple info, events, photos, theme settings, and CRUD helpers for events and photos.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor (authenticated or anonymous) using React Query, and invalidates dependent queries whenever the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Implements an Internet Identity authentication context and provider using DFINITY's AuthClient, exposing login/logout functions, identity state, and login status flags.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Provides React Query hooks for all backend operations including user profiles, invitations, events, RSVPs, photos, and background music. Wraps actor calls with useQuery and useMutation, handling cache invalidation.
frontend/src/hooks/useScrollAnimation.ts: Custom hook that uses IntersectionObserver to track when an element enters the viewport, returning a ref and isVisible boolean with configurable threshold, rootMargin, and triggerOnce options.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that imports Google Fonts, sets up Tailwind base/components/utilities, and defines CSS custom properties for light and dark theme design tokens including ivory, gold, crimson, and rose palettes.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that renders the React app wrapped in QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider, mounting it to the root DOM element.
frontend/src/pages/CreateInvitationWizar: Multi-step wizard page for creating wedding invitations, guiding users through couple details, events, theme, media, and review steps before submitting to the backend with photo and event creation.
frontend/src/pages/Dashboard.tsx: Dashboard page displaying all user invitations with actions to create, edit, delete, publish, and share them, plus a modal for viewing RSVP responses.
frontend/src/pages/GuestInvitation.tsx: Public guest-facing invitation page that fetches and renders a full wedding invitation by slug, including hero, couple intro, events, photo gallery, RSVP form, venue, countdown, and music controller.
frontend/src/pages/InvitationEditor.tsx: A full-screen invitation editor page that loads an existing invitation by slug and provides tabbed editing for theme, events, and media, with save and preview functionality.
frontend/src/pages/LandingPage.tsx: The marketing landing page for the Vivah app, showcasing features, sample invitation previews, and navigation to create or manage invitations.
frontend/src/pages/NotFound.tsx: A 404 error page with a decorative heart animation and buttons to navigate back to the home page or dashboard.
frontend/src/utils/animations.ts: Defines animation mode types and exports helper functions that return Tailwind CSS animation/transition class strings for different animation modes (minimal, elegant, cinematic), plus petal fall animation data.
frontend/src/utils/colorUtils.ts: Provides utility functions for color calculations including luminance, contrast color detection, accessible text color selection, and hex-to-rgba conversion.
frontend/src/utils/eventIcons.tsx: Maps wedding EventType enum values to visual configuration objects (icon, colors, gradients, labels) and exports both a lookup function and a pre-built record for all event types.
frontend/src/utils/templateDefinitions.t: Defines the TemplateDefinition interface and exports an array of five premium wedding theme configurations (Royal Indian, Modern Minimal, Floral Luxury, Dark Cinematic, Temple Traditional) with colors, fonts, and decorative elements.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for extracting, storing, and clearing URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routing, with sessionStorage persistence support.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining dark mode, content paths, and an extended theme with custom color palettes (gold, crimson, rose, charcoal, ivory), font families, border radii, and box shadows using CSS variables and OKLCH colors.
project_state.json: Project state tracking file describing an invitation management platform, its known issues (black background, broken invitation creation, auth errors), and pending feature requests to remove authentication and fix UI visibility.
